source_plan: Refund line item 2 of order #4421 with reason 'damaged'; mark notify-customer true.

steps.intent: Open the admin order detail for order #4421 at {{ENV_URL}}/admin/orders/order_04421.
Open the Refunds tab on order #4421 at {{ENV_URL}}/admin/orders/order_04421?tab=refunds.
Submit the refund form: line_no=2, reason='damaged', notify_customer=on. Leave amount blank so the server defaults to the full line total.
